name: Felipe Antunes
headline: Front-End Developer · Building with React & AI
bio: I build accessible, high-performance interfaces and use AI strategically to accelerate product delivery.
projects_description: Here are some of my recent projects. You can find more details and access the repositories on GitHub.

project-1.description: Projects to practice front-end skills, including accessibility, performance and AI integration.

project-2.description: A simple and accessible character and word counter.

project-3.description: Clone of the Ableton Live interface, focused on accessibility and performance.

project-4.description: Clone of the Monstercat interface, focused on accessibility and performance.

project-6.description: A tool to manage and track your movie and series watchlist.
